commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test: Add core cryptographic proof flow test

Validates the fundamental crypto guarantees:
- Ed25519 signature generation and verification
- Tamper detection (major and subtle changes)
- RFC 3161 external timestamping (FreeTSA)
- Timestamp tamper detection

Run with: python3 test_core_proof_flow.py

Also updates mypy config to ignore errors in legacy modules.

commit.message:
refactor: opção A — yt-dlp -g + ffmpeg A (WARP+GOST) + ffmpeg B (encoder)

- yt-dlp -g com proxy ISP → URL apenas
- ffmpeg A: -http_proxy GOST, -ss seek, -c copy -f mpegts pipe:1
- ffmpeg B: x11grab + pipe:0 + anullsrc → filterComplex → CBR → RTMP
- overlay eof_action=pass: live continua se HLS morrer
- amix duration=longest: silêncio fallback após HLS terminar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: keyboard shortcuts for TF/symbol + independent TF per secondary chart

- Keys 1-7 select timeframes (1m/5m/15m/1h/4h/1d/1wk) on main chart
- Keys q/w/e switch symbol (ES/YM/NQ) on main chart
- Secondary charts now use their own panel.timeframe for aggregation
  and all PSP/QTS/TC calculations instead of following main chart TF
- Add TF dropdown selector to secondary chart header overlay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: patch-first memmap layout + fix Dataset __getitem__ indexing

- Add _transpose_tf_to_pf() helper: builds time-first _tf.dat on disk
  then transposes chunk-by-chunk to patch-first _pf.dat (~2 GB RAM/chunk)
  and deletes the temp file
- STEP 6 cache key changed: *_pf.dat (incompatible with old *_tf.dat/bare .dat)
- Both memmap opens (cache hit + post-transpose) now use shape=(n_patches, T, enc_dim)
- S2SHotspotDatasetMixed.__getitem__:    meteo[patch_i, hs:he, :] (was [hs:he, patch_i, :])
- S2SHotspotDatasetUnfiltered.n_patches: meteo_patched.shape[0]   (was shape[1])
- S2SHotspotDatasetUnfiltered.__getitem__: same index fix as Mixed

Effect: each __getitem__ now reads ~28 KB contiguous from the 238 GB file
instead of 7 seeks × ~98 MB apart → eliminates OS page-cache thrashing,
lowers CPU I/O wait, frees DataLoader workers to actually prefetch

Windows action required:
  1. Fix 2d data: era5_to_daily --overwrite, resample_to_fwi_grid --overwrite
  2. Delete old cache: del outputs\cache\meteo_p16_C8_T2427_*.*
  3. git pull → retrain with --neg_ratio 5 --num_workers 4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复顶部工具栏消失问题 - 使用绝对定位固定所有顶部栏

问题分析：
- 用户反馈"从左边到中间选择到右边一起消失了"
- 整个顶部工具栏（包括角色切换、对话标题、所有按钮）都消失
- 根本原因：ConversationView 使用 flex-1 占据所有空间，挤压了顶部工具栏

解决方案：
- 中间栏改为 relative 定位
- 顶部工具栏使用 absolute + z-20 固定在顶部
- 添加半透明背景 bg-slate-950/95 和 backdrop-blur-sm
- 对话内容区域使用 pt-[57px] 留出顶部空间
- 与左侧对话列表使用相同的固定定位方案

技术细节：
- 左侧：absolute top-0 + pt-16
- 中间：absolute top-0 + pt-[57px]
- 确保两个顶部栏都不会被内容滚动影响

Add delete social post feature — removes from Facebook/Instagram + DB

Vendors can now delete posted social posts from the dashboard. The delete
button calls the Graph API to remove the post from the platform, then
deletes the DB record. For draft/pending/failed posts, uses existing
cancel flow. Instagram doesn't support API deletion so those fall back
to DB-only cleanup.

commit.message:
fix: catch \Throwable in handleGoogleCallback to prevent 500 on first Google login

Root cause: catch (Exception \$e) does not catch PHP Error subclasses (TypeError, Error).
When ServicePackage::find(1) returns null and \$servicePackage->id is accessed,
a TypeError escapes the catch block causing a 500. User already created in DB,
so reload finds them via google_id and succeeds.

Fix:
- Use catch (\Throwable \$e) for all try-catch blocks in handleGoogleCallback
- Add null check: if (\$servicePackage) before creating SubscriptionPeriod
- Add \$transactionStarted flag so DB::rollback() is only called when transaction is open
- Isolate non-critical post-commit code (mail sending) in its own try-catch

commit.message:
Add skill gate states, dispatch chain tests, and review fixes

Introduce engine-enforced skill gate state type that blocks until
required skills are loaded, with epoch-based freshness for reload
after context clear. Replace prompt-based "MANDATORY FIRST ACTION"
instructions across all workflow templates.

- Engine: _handleSkillGate with auto-transition, actionPrompt threading
- Types: skills array on states, skill_epoch/loaded_skills on sessions
- Loader: validate skill gate states (non-empty skills array)
- Tools: format skill_gate history events, forcePrompt on revisits
- Dashboard: render skill gates (teal), loaded_skills with staleness
- Templates: migrate all 9 code workflows to skill gate pattern
- Templates: rename skill gate transition ready→continue to match engine
- Hooks: bump skill_epoch on plan resume and context clear
- Tests: 31 skill-gate tests including 17 dispatch chain integration
- Fix: {{exitCode}}→{{exit_code}} in SKILL.md (matches engine vars)
- Fix: escapeHtml on skill names in dashboard flags
- Fix: temp file cleanup (|| rm -f) in hook jq writes
- Fix: actionPrompt preserved through action→skill gate path

commit.message:
Remover fondos españoles, arreglar tabs mobile, agregar comparación de direcciones

CAMBIO 1: REMOVER FONDOS ESPAÑOLES SIN DATOS REALES
- Eliminados 9 fondos españoles (CaixaBank, Santander, BBVA)
- Razón: No tienen datos reales disponibles (solo simulados)
- Se mantienen fondos USA que sí tienen datos reales de Yahoo Finance

CAMBIO 2: ARREGLAR TABS EN MOBILE
- Problema: Últimas 2 tabs no se veían en mobile
- Solución: Scroll horizontal en mobile
- Agregado overflow-x-auto wrapper
- Responsive padding: px-4 en mobile, px-6 en desktop
- Responsive font: text-sm en mobile, text-base en desktop
- whitespace-nowrap para evitar saltos de línea

CAMBIO 3: COMPARACIÓN DE DIRECCIONES EN CONSULTA DE ZONA
- Ahora se pueden comparar hasta 5 direcciones simultáneamente
- Botón "Agregar otra dirección" (Plus icon)
- Botón "X" para remover direcciones
- Búsqueda en paralelo de todas las direcciones

NUEVO: GANADOR GENERAL
- Card destacado con trofeo dorado
- Calcula mejor puntuación promedio de todas las categorías
- Solo se muestra cuando hay 2+ direcciones

NUEVO: GANADORES POR CATEGORÍA
- Grid con 8 categorías (Básicas, Servicios, Calidad de vida, etc.)
- Muestra qué dirección gana en cada categoría
- Iconos por categoría

NUEVO: TABLA DE COMPARACIÓN DETALLADA
- Comparación lado a lado de todas las métricas
- Organizada por categorías
- Trofeos dorados marcan el mejor valor en cada métrica
- Fondo verde destaca las celdas ganadoras
- Colores según puntuación (verde/amarillo/rojo)
- Scroll horizontal para múltiples direcciones

MEJORAS UX:
- Enter en inputs ejecuta la búsqueda
- Contador dinámico "Comparar X direcciones"
- Direcciones acortadas en headers de tabla
- Responsive: scroll horizontal en tablas anchas

feat: Phase 2 — voice assistant, memory system, Gemini Live integration

Add Gemini Live API bidirectional audio streaming for voice-based legal
assistant. Integrate Mark-XXX patterns (memory extraction, tool calling,
browser automation stub) while keeping av-asistan as the main platform.

New modules:

  tool declarations (hukuki_soru_sor, madde_ara, hafiza_hatirla), system prompt

Infrastructure:
- 3 new DB tables: voice_sessions, conversation_messages, memory_entries
- WebSocket endpoint /ws/voice for browser-server audio streaming
- Feature flags: VOICE_ENABLED, BROWSER_ENABLED, MEMORY_ENABLED
- Frontend voice UI with AudioWorklet microphone capture and PCM playback

Tested: Gemini 2.5 Flash text + native-audio-latest Live API with tool
calling confirmed working. RAG pipeline unchanged, no regressions.

commit.message:
Throttle video status polling: 3min initial delay then every 30s

Was checking every 8s which is wasteful for a 5-15min generation job.
Now waits 3 minutes before the first status check, then polls every 30s.
UI shows a live countdown during the initial wait period.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix chat.log not reaching GitHub: gitignore was blocking logs/

- .gitignore: change \`logs/\` -> \`logs/*\` + \`!logs/chat.log\` so chat.log
  can be tracked while other log files remain ignored
- ChatOrchestrator: use \`git add -f\` (force) as belt-and-suspenders

Without this fix, \`git add logs/chat.log\` silently did nothing
because the parent directory was excluded by gitignore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove false Nom claim and unify text styling on privacy page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Dockerfiles y docker-compose para arquitectura de dos procesos

Contenedores independientes respetando la separación de responsabilidades:

  Dockerfile.market_data
    - Proceso: market_data_process.py
    - Rol: ingesta OHLCV desde Binance MAINNET → PostgreSQL
    - Imagen mínima: python:3.12-slim + dependencias exactas
    - Health check: pgrep sobre el proceso

  Dockerfile.bot
    - Proceso: bot_trading_v5.py
    - Rol: motor de trading multi-estrategia v5 (ML híbrido)
    - Incluye: estrategias, ML artifacts, risk layers, repositorios
    - Health check: curl /health (Flask :8001)
    - Puerto expuesto: HEALTH_PORT (default 8001)

  docker-compose.yml
    - Orquesta ambos servicios con network_mode: host
      (acceso directo a PostgreSQL en 192.168.1.50)
    - bot-trading depends_on market-data (service_healthy)
    - Volúmenes: logs/ y artifacts/ montados desde el host
    - restart: unless-stopped en ambos servicios
    - Log rotation: 50MB×5 (market-data), 100MB×10 (bot-trading)

  .dockerignore
    - Excluye: .env, .venv, __pycache__, backtest_out*, tests/,
      versiones antiguas del bot (v2/v3/v4), artefactos ML inactivos

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
